components.name: commons-lang3
components.description:
Apache Commons Lang, a package of Java utility classes for the
  classes that are in java.lang's hierarchy, or are considered to be so
  standard as to justify existence in java.lang.
components.author: The Apache Software Foundation

components.name: jackson-core
components.description: Core Jackson processing abstractions (aka Streaming API), implementation for JSON
components.author: FasterXML, LLC

components.name: commons-cli
components.description: Apache Commons CLI provides a simple API for presenting, processing and validating a Command Line Interface.
components.author: The Apache Software Foundation

components.name: json
components.description:
JSON is a light-weight, language independent, data interchange format.
        See http://www.JSON.org/

        The files in this package implement JSON encoders/decoders in Java.
        It also includes the capability to convert between JSON and XML, HTTP
        headers, Cookies, and CDL.

        This is a reference implementation. There are a large number of JSON packages
        in Java. Perhaps someday the Java community will standardize on one. Until
        then, choose carefully.
components.author: Douglas Crockford

components.name: commons-logging
components.description:
Apache Commons Logging is a thin adapter allowing configurable bridging to other,
    well-known logging systems.
components.author: The Apache Software Foundation

components.name: commons-codec
components.description:
The Apache Commons Codec component contains encoder and decoders for
     various formats such as Base16, Base32, Base64, digest, and Hexadecimal. In addition to these
     widely used encoders and decoders, the codec package also maintains a
     collection of phonetic encoding utilities.
components.author: The Apache Software Foundation

components.name: commons-io
components.description:
The Apache Commons IO library contains utility classes, stream implementations, file filters,
file comparators, endian transformation classes, and much more.
components.author: The Apache Software Foundation

components.name: commons-httpclient
components.description: The HttpClient  component supports the client-side of RFC 1945 (HTTP/1.0)  and RFC 2616 (HTTP/1.1) , several related specifications (RFC 2109 (Cookies) , RFC 2617 (HTTP Authentication) , etc.), and provides a framework by which new request types (methods) or HTTP extensions can be created easily.
components.author: Apache Software Foundation

components.name: jackson-databind
components.description: General data-binding functionality for Jackson: works on core streaming API
components.author: FasterXML, LLC

components.name: jackson-annotations
components.description: Core annotations used for value types, used by Jackson data binding package.
components.author: FasterXML, LLC
